items.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
items.body: \Starting today, items listed for sale on Steam Community Market will remain in your inventory for use while they are listed (e.g., your weapon can be equipped in your loadout while it is listed). While listed, items can

items.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
items.body: \Mitigated a performance issue that primarily affected Windows 10 users with recent Intel CPUs.Fixed a case where the Delete Item inventory option wasn't working.Fixed a case of visual corruption using iron sights on AMD
